raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A section review centrally includes checking whether the argument from benchmark results to robustness conclusions is logically coherent.","R1.3":"Because the artifact makes quantitative performance and ablation claims, verifying that reported results support those claims is load-bearing.","R1.4":"The section explicitly compares against prior state of the art and claims MARCO is leading, making novelty and delta assessment central.","R1.6":"A generic review of a paper section normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, and concision.","RX.1":"The projection must account for uncertainty in what can be inferred from the provided section alone.","RX.2":"The artifact contains strong claims about leadership, robustness, and broad applicability, so avoiding overclaim is essential.","RX.3":"The delegation is only to review this section, so responsibilities must stay within the section and not expand into executing edits or external audits.","RX.4":"Review responsibility includes flagging claims that could mislead downstream readers or inflate empirical implications.","RX.5":"Any review should preserve traceability to the specific claims, metrics, and comparisons present in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A section review centrally includes checking whether the argument from benchmark results to robustness conclusions is logically coherent.
rationale.R1.3: Because the artifact makes quantitative performance and ablation claims, verifying that reported results support those claims is load-bearing.
rationale.R1.4: The section explicitly compares against prior state of the art and claims MARCO is leading, making novelty and delta assessment central.
rationale.R1.6: A generic review of a paper section normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must account for uncertainty in what can be inferred from the provided section alone.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains strong claims about leadership, robustness, and broad applicability, so avoiding overclaim is essential.
rationale.RX.3: The delegation is only to review this section, so responsibilities must stay within the section and not expand into executing edits or external audits.
rationale.RX.4: Review responsibility includes flagging claims that could mislead downstream readers or inflate empirical implications.
rationale.RX.5: Any review should preserve traceability to the specific claims, metrics, and comparisons present in the artifact.
